zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne ferch Cadwgan於大約1035年出生在威爾士時，她的父親Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd57歲，母親Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan41歲。她和Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne ferch Cadwgan于大约1035年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd57岁，母亲Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan41岁。她和Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Anne ferch Cadwgan was born about 1035, in Wales, her father, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, was 57 and her mother, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, was 41. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale. She died in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne ferch Cadwgan est née environ 1035, à Galles, son père, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale. Elle est décédée à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne ferch Cadwgan um 1035 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd 57 und ihre Mutter Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan 41. Sie hatte mit Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne ferch Cadwgan è nata il circa 1035 nel Galles, sua padre, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale. Morì nel Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne ferch Cadwganが約1035年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodryddは57歳，母Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorganは41歳であった。彼女はLlywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yaleとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne ferch Cadwgan(이)가 대략 1035년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne ferch Cadwgan nasceu aproximadamente 1035, em Gales, seu pai, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale. Ela faleceu em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne ferch Cadwgan родилась около 1035 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale. Она умерла в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne ferch Cadwgan nació aproximadamente 1035, en Gales, su papá, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale. Murió en Gales, Reino Unido.
